text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The sterile precision of the glass-walled room in the first image suggests boundaries and rules, yet beckons with possibility. The second image, with its bold R+D proclamation and vibrant colors, excites me about innovation and the future. The contrast between the ordered energy of the meeting space and the creative flair of the R+D display fills me with hope for harmonious synthesis between structure and imagination.
